quote:
Even the most thunderous footsteps of war can become a quiet breeze for the patient mind.

When a ceasefire is carved from words, its true power is measured by the silence that follows.

The smallest creatures seeking shelter teach that even stone walls have unseen cracks.

If a bird named Spirit cannot find a safe place to fly, it reminds us how fragile freedom can be.

Those who claim to wield the sword of justice first must learn the ancient art of listening.

The greatest victories rise when compassion swims beneath the surface of discord.

A single ember of kindness can light a blaze that outlasts even the fiercest storm.
quote_preview: Even the most thunderous footsteps of war can become a quiet breeze for the patient mind.
